description_long: This is a rectangular blackboard with a dark green writing surface, framed by a medium-thickness wooden border with a warm brown finish. The writing surface displays several chalk-written mathematical equations, some partially erased, giving it a lightly used appearance. The frame is simple and functional, with no visible decorative elements or chalk holder. The blackboard is relatively thin in profile, as seen from the side views, and appears designed for wall mounting. The surface is matte, reducing glare and making chalk writing easily visible. There are no visible signs of heavy wear, chips, or damage on either the frame or the writing surface.
description: A rectangular, wall-mounted blackboard with a green chalk surface and a medium brown wooden frame, featuring chalk-written math equations and a lightly used appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green chalkboard surface with math equations and a wooden frame.
description_view_1: Side profile view revealing the thinness of the blackboard and the wooden frame's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view of the blackboard, showing the back of the frame and a faint outline of the writing surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the slim profile and wooden frame.
attribute_frame_design: medium-thickness wooden frame, brown color, simple rectangular profile, no decorative features
